task_updates.executor_notes: Restructured audit_wrap so each invocation resets context.external_queue, runs the tool body inside store.transaction(), records the tool_calls row and any queued external-request ledger rows in the same transaction, then runs queued external callables only after commit. Success marks ledger rows confirmed; callable exceptions mark rows failed and re-raise. Verification: tests/test_tool_kit_external_queue.py passed; existing tests/test_tool_kit.py passed unchanged; full `python -m pytest --tb=no -q --no-header` passed with 39 tests.

Mirrored the Sprint 1b Store Protocol additions in SQLiteStore: recovery queries, orphan marking, unprocessed/load/update message helpers, and image CRUD with auto reference-key generation. Verified create_message keeps synthesize_outbound_id=True by default and leaves resident outbound discord_message_id NULL when False; insert_pending continues to persist request_body. Verification: tests/test_sqlite_store_v1b.py passed; existing tests/test_sqlite_store.py passed; signature smoke check found no missing SQLite methods; full `python -m pytest --tb=no -q --no-header` passed with 39 tests.
commands_run: python - <<'PY' ... SQLiteStore method/signature smoke check ... PY
